# Saturday API — Complete Documentation for LLM Context

> Nutrition intelligence for endurance athletes — as an API.
> Base URL: https://api.saturday.fit
> Authentication: Bearer token (API key or OAuth2 JWT)

---

## Overview

Saturday provides AI-powered nutrition intelligence for endurance athletes. The API calculates personalized fuel, hydration, and electrolyte recommendations based on athlete profiles, activity parameters, and environmental conditions.

The API is FREE for partners to integrate. Athletes access teaser data (ranges) at no cost. For full precision (exact numbers), athletes subscribe to Saturday directly.

## Authentication

### API Keys
All server-to-server requests use API keys in the Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer sk_test_abc123def456
```

Key prefixes:
- `sk_test_` — Sandbox (development, no rate limit pressure)
- `sk_live_` — Production (real athlete data)

### OAuth2
For athlete-delegated access, use OAuth2 Authorization Code flow with PKCE.
Scopes: athlete:read, athlete:write, activity:read, activity:write, nutrition:read, ai:chat

## Safety Model

CRITICAL: Every response includes safety metadata. Safety data is NEVER gated behind subscription status.

Exercise-associated hyponatremia (overdrinking that dilutes blood sodium) kills athletes. Saturday's engine enforces hard physiological limits:
- fluid_physiological_limit: Caps fluid at gastric emptying rate
- sodium_ceiling: Maximum safe sodium per hour
- minimum_sodium: Minimum sodium for long activities
- carb_gut_tolerance: Limits carbs to demonstrated tolerance

Safety block structure:
```json
{
  "safety": {
    "risk_level": "low|moderate|high|critical",
    "flags": ["high_thermal_stress", "extended_duration", ...],
    "warnings": ["Human-readable warning messages"],
    "guardrails_applied": ["sodium_ceiling", "fluid_physiological_limit", ...],
    "contraindications": []
  }
}
```

The `not_instructions: true` field tells AI consumers that prescriptions are guidance for human consideration, not executable commands.

## Core Endpoints

### POST /v1/nutrition/calculate
Calculate fuel/hydration/electrolyte prescription.

Request:
```json
{
  "activity_type": "running",
  "duration_minutes": 90,
  "intensity": "moderate",
  "athlete_weight_kg": 70,
  "athlete_id": "ath_abc123",
  "conditions": {
    "temperature_celsius": 25,
    "humidity_percent": 60
  }
}
```

Response (full tier):
```json
{
  "prescription": {
    "carbohydrate": { "grams_per_hour": 60, "total_grams": 90, "confidence": "high" },
    "hydration": { "ml_per_hour": 600, "total_ml": 900, "confidence": "moderate" },
    "sodium": { "mg_per_hour": 500, "total_mg": 750, "confidence": "moderate" }
  },
  "safety": { "risk_level": "low", "guardrails_applied": ["sodium_ceiling", "fluid_physiological_limit"] },
  "metadata": { "request_id": "req_abc123", "inputs_quality": "standard" }
}
```

Response (teaser tier — unsubscribed athlete):
```json
{
  "prescription": {
    "carbohydrate": { "grams_per_hour_range": { "min": 45, "max": 75 } },
    "hydration": { "ml_per_hour_range": { "min": 450, "max": 750 } },
    "sodium": { "mg_per_hour_range": { "min": 350, "max": 650 } }
  },
  "safety": { "risk_level": "low", "guardrails_applied": ["sodium_ceiling"] },
  "subscription": { "status": "teaser", "upgrade_url": "https://saturday.fit/subscribe?ref=PARTNER_ID" }
}
```

### POST /v1/nutrition/calculate/batch
Batch calculate for up to 50 scenarios.

### POST /v1/nutrition/calculate/compare
Compare prescriptions across different conditions (race-day planning).

### POST /v1/athletes
Create an athlete profile (partner-scoped).

Required: weight_kg
Optional: fitness_level, primary_sport, sweat_level, saltiness, satiety_level, carb_tolerance, concerns, eating_disorder_flag

### GET /v1/athletes
List partner's athletes (paginated).

### GET /v1/athletes/{id}
Get athlete profile.

### PATCH /v1/athletes/{id}
Update athlete profile (partial update).

### DELETE /v1/athletes/{id}
Delete athlete and all associated data (cascading, irreversible).

### POST /v1/athletes/{id}/activities
Create an activity (type, duration_minutes required; intensity, conditions, sub_activities optional).

### GET /v1/athletes/{id}/activities
List activities (filterable by date range and type).

### POST /v1/athletes/{id}/activities/{activityId}/prescription
Calculate prescription for this activity.

### POST /v1/athletes/{id}/activities/{activityId}/feedback
Submit post-activity feedback (gi_comfort, energy_level, hydration_feel, actual_intake).

### POST /v1/inference/activity-type
Infer activity type from metadata (title, description, tags).

### POST /v1/ai/conversations
Start AI coaching conversation for an athlete (SSE streaming).

### POST /v1/ai/conversations/{convID}/messages
Send message to AI coach (response streamed via SSE).

### POST /v1/webhooks
Register webhook for real-time event notifications. Events include: athlete.created, prescription.calculated, subscription.activated, etc. Webhooks are HMAC-SHA256 signed.

## Activity Types
running, cycling, swimming, triathlon, xc_skiing, rowing, hiking, lift

## Error Format (Stripe-style)
```json
{
  "error": {
    "type": "invalid_request",
    "code": "missing_required_field",
    "message": "Human-readable description",
    "param": "field_name",
    "documentation_url": "https://api.saturday.fit/docs/errors#code",
    "request_id": "req_abc123"
  }
}
```

Error types: authentication_error (401), authorization_error (403), invalid_request (400), resource_not_found (404), rate_limit_exceeded (429), safety_limit (422), api_error (500)

## Rate Limiting
Per API key. Headers: X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset.
429 responses include Retry-After header.

## Feature Gates
Features progress: STEALTH -> ALPHA -> BETA -> GA -> DEPRECATED.
Current: nutrition=ALPHA, products=STEALTH, gear=STEALTH, ai_coach=STEALTH, ai_data=STEALTH.

## Data Policy
- Response data: display-only license (no ML/AI training)
- Teaser tier: "Powered by Saturday" attribution required
- Product database: competitive IP, no bulk export
- GDPR: export via POST /v1/athletes/{id}/export, delete via DELETE /v1/athletes/{id}

## MCP Server
Saturday provides a native MCP server at https://api.saturday.fit/v1/mcp for AI agent tool discovery and execution.

## Contact
api@saturday.fit
